summary: Read-only curriculum search Apps Script project. Searches configured Google Sheets metadata index and optional Drive folders. No metadata write-back or sync behavior is enabled.
pending_decisions: Approve canonical_owner_database mapping for each field.
Approve readiness_status vocabulary and mapping source.
Confirm whether Drive search remains folder-scoped.
blockers: Confirm canonical ownership of curriculum metadata before any write-back is added.
Confirm duplicate detection and merge policy for records that appear in Sheets, Drive, Notion, or dashboards.
Confirm approved schema contract for dashboard and Notion-backed curriculum metadata.
reviewQuestions: Which system owns each metadata field?
Should duplicate-looking records be collapsed, flagged, or shown separately?
Which fields are safe to expose to teachers in the sidebar?
Should Drive search be folder-limited or domain-wide?
What approved readiness vocabulary should be configured in CURRICULUM_SEARCH_READINESS_VOCABULARY?
